---
title: "Test Time of Whisper+tinyLLama+Kokoro TTS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-02"
---
```{r}
# replace with your own path

ollama_file <-"C:\\Users\\haivu\\OneDrive - Sheridan College\\Desktop\\computer\\Project\\Chat_Box_AI\\test_requirement\\prompt_ollama.txt"
kokoro_file <- "C:\\Users\\haivu\\OneDrive - Sheridan College\\Desktop\\computer\\Project\\Chat_Box_AI\\test_requirement\\tts_kokoro.txt"
whisper_file <- "C:\\Users\\haivu\\OneDrive - Sheridan College\\Desktop\\computer\\Project\\Chat_Box_AI\\test_requirement\\transcribe_whisper.txt"

ollama <- readLines(ollama_file)
kokoro <- readLines(kokoro_file)
whisper <- readLines(whisper_file)

ollama_numeric <- as.numeric(ollama)
kokoro_numeric <- as.numeric(kokoro)
whisper_numeric <- as.numeric(whisper)

df <- bind_rows(
  
  data.frame(model = "Kokoro TTS", value = kokoro_numeric),
  data.frame(model = "Ollama - Time to first chunk", value = ollama_numeric),
  data.frame(model = "Faster Whisper", value = whisper_numeric)
)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)



# Calculate medians for labeling
medians <- df %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarize(median_val = median(value, na.rm = TRUE))

# Update the plot to include labels
ggplot(df, aes(x = model, y = value, fill = model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  # This adds the exact numbers to the plot
  geom_text(data = medians, aes(x = model, y = median_val, label = round(median_val, 3)), 
            vjust = -1.5, size = 5) +
  labs(title = "Comparison of Model Latency",
       x = "Model Type",
       y = "Time (seconds)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
